B C G I L O P S V 

O

onConnectedToPrivateNetwork() - Method in interface com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.BluetoothService.BluetoothCredentialsSenderCallback
Will be called when private network is joined.
onConnectionFailed() - Method in interface com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.SoftApService.SoftApDeviceConnectionCallback
Will be called when the user's phone/tablet can't connect to desired Soft AP network.
onConnectionIsNotEstablished() - Method in interface com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.BluetoothService.BluetoothCredentialsSenderCallback
Will be called when connection is not established.
onConnectionIsNotEstablished() - Method in interface com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.BluetoothService.BluetoothDeviceInfoCallback
Will be called when connection is not established.
onConnectionIsNotEstablished() - Method in interface com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.BluetoothService.BluetoothIdentificationCallback
Will be called when connection is not established.
onCredentialsSent() - Method in interface com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.BluetoothService.BluetoothCredentialsSenderCallback
Will be called when private credentials are sent.
onCredentialsSent() - Method in interface com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.SoftApService.SoftApCredentialsSenderCallback
Will be called when network credentials are sent.
onDeviceConnectedSuccessfully() - Method in interface com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.BluetoothService.BluetoothDeviceConnectionCallback
Will be called when a BT connection will be successfully established.
onDeviceConnectedSuccessfully() - Method in interface com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.SoftApService.SoftApDeviceConnectionCallback
Will be called when a connection with a Soft AP network will be successfully established.
onDeviceIdentificationActionSent() - Method in interface com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.BluetoothService.BluetoothIdentificationCallback
Will be called when request to execute an identify-action has been sent to the Cirrent cloud.
onDeviceIdentificationActionSent() - Method in interface com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.SoftApService.SoftApIdentificationCallback
Will be called when request to execute an identify-action has been sent to the Cirrent cloud.
onDeviceInfoReceived(DeviceInfo, List<WiFiNetwork>) - Method in interface com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.SoftApService.SoftApDeviceInfoCallback
Will be called when device info will be received.
onDroppedSoftApNetwork() - Method in interface com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.SoftApService.SoftApJoiningStatusCallback
Will be called if the tablet/phone drops off the softAP network.
onError(BluetoothService.BluetoothDeviceConnectionError) - Method in interface com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.BluetoothService.BluetoothDeviceConnectionCallback
Will be called in the following cases: 1.
onError(SoftApService.SoftApDeviceConnectionError) - Method in interface com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.SoftApService.SoftApDeviceConnectionCallback
Will be called in the following cases: 1.
onFailedToFindDevice() - Method in interface com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.BluetoothService.BluetoothDeviceConnectionCallback
Will be called when phone/tablet can't find the device.
onFailedToGetNetworkStatus() - Method in interface com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.BluetoothService.BluetoothCredentialsSenderCallback
Will be called when phone/tablet is failed to get network status after sending credentials.
onFailedToReturnToNetworkWithInternet() - Method in interface com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.SoftApService.InternetConnectionCallback
Will be called when user's phone/tablet can't return to network that connected to the internet.
onFailedToReturnToNetworkWithInternet() - Method in interface com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.SoftApService.SoftApCredentialsSenderCallback
Will be called when user's phone/tablet can't return to network that connected to the internet.
onIncorrectPriorityValueUsed() - Method in interface com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.BluetoothService.BluetoothCredentialsSenderCallback
Will be called when incorrect network priority value is used.
onIncorrectPriorityValueUsed() - Method in interface com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.SoftApService.SoftApCredentialsSenderCallback
Will be called when incorrect network priority value is used.
onInfoReceived(DeviceInfo, List<WiFiNetwork>) - Method in interface com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.BluetoothService.BluetoothDeviceInfoCallback
Will be called when info is received from the device.
onJoiningProcess() - Method in interface com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.SoftApService.SoftApJoiningStatusCallback
Will be called while the device is in the process of joining the private network.
onNetworkJoined() - Method in interface com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.SoftApService.SoftApJoiningStatusCallback
Will be called when the device has joined the private network.
onNetworkJoiningFailed() - Method in interface com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.BluetoothService.BluetoothCredentialsSenderCallback
Will be called when the device is failed to join the private network.
onNetworkJoiningFailed() - Method in interface com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.SoftApService.SoftApCredentialsSenderCallback
Will be called when device will failed joining to network.
onNetworkJoiningFailed() - Method in interface com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.SoftApService.SoftApJoiningStatusCallback
Will be called if the device fails to join the private network.
onOperationTimeLimitExceeded() - Method in interface com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.BluetoothService.BluetoothCredentialsSenderCallback
Will be called when BT operation time limit is exceeded.
onOperationTimeLimitExceeded() - Method in interface com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.BluetoothService.BluetoothDeviceInfoCallback
Will be called when BT operation time limit is exceeded.
onOperationTimeLimitExceeded() - Method in interface com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.BluetoothService.BluetoothIdentificationCallback
Will be called when BT operation time limit is exceeded.
onReturnedToNetworkWithInternet() - Method in interface com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.SoftApService.InternetConnectionCallback
Will be called when user's phone/tablet will be returned that connected to the internet.
onReturnedToNetworkWithInternet() - Method in interface com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.SoftApService.SoftApCredentialsSenderCallback
Will be called when user's phone/tablet will be returned that connected to the internet.
B C G I L O P S V
